title: Notechidnopsis columnaris

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Notechidnopsis columnaris include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
